easy.title: Alias Math Import
easy.description: Import math as m and calculate sqrt of 144.
easy.solution:
import math as m
def get_sqrt(): return m.sqrt(144)

medium.title: Dynamic Module Loader
medium.description: Write function importing module by string name using `importlib`.
medium.solution:
import importlib
def load_mod(name):
    mod = importlib.import_module(name)
    return mod is not None

hard.title: Inspect sys.path Searcher
hard.description: Return True if dir_path exists in sys.path.

debugging.title: Fix Wildcard Import
debugging.description: Replace wildcard import with explicit imports.
